Every community-made TurboLoop video, in one place. Stories, tutorials, recaps — curated by the team, free to watch, ready to share. Submit your own and join the wall.

security:
if you can prove us
              wrong.

Inspect the smart contract. If you can show any way the team
              could harm holders — a hidden owner, an upgrade path, a backdoor
              — the prize is yours. The bounty is real and it’s been
              sitting there since launch.
We removed every way we could harm you. What remains is code, published, locked, and verified by people who don't work for us.

events:
A snapshot of meetups already shipped — from Lagos to Mumbai
              to Dubai.

Be the first to organize one in your city. We fund 50 % up
                front to cover venue + logistics.

Every event you host stacks toward a permanent monthly
              stipend. Hit the bars below and the title is yours.

Stipends are paid only if the leader’s team maintains
            positive net deposit growth month-over-month.

Every approved organizer ships day-one with the same toolkit
              we use ourselves. No design work, no decks to write, no PR
              to chase. Higher tiers unlock the physical goods.

promotions:
Inspect the smart contract. If you can prove there’s any
                way the team could harm holders, the prize is yours.

We pay creators per view on TurboLoop content. Reels, explainers,
              livestreams — anything that brings new eyes to the ecosystem.
              Tiers based on verified view counts within 30 days of post.

Lead a community Zoom session in your language, weekly. We
              provide the slide deck, the schedule, and onboarding support.
              You bring the energy and your local audience.
Native or fluent in your hosted language
Stablecoin payout on the 1st of each month

When you bring a new member into the network and they make their
              first deposit, you receive a stablecoin bonus — generated by the
              protocol itself, not deducted from your referral. Bonus amount
              scales with deposit tier. See the smart contract for exact
              values, or ask a Local Presenter to walk you through it.
Three real ways to get paid.
A six-figure bounty for security researchers, a per-view payout for creators, and a monthly stipend for community leaders. All paid in stablecoins.
